steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage calls this a “mutually beneficial” relationship. This single phrase signals that both the tree and the fungus must benefit equally. Since the tree provides carbon, the fungus must provide something beneficial in return, meaning the blank must express the idea of giving back.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the word
steps.content: ”Reciprocates” means to return a favor or respond in kind — exactly what the fungus does by enhancing the tree's nitrogen uptake after the tree provided it carbon. The other three options don't express this idea of giving back in a mutual relationship. That matches choice B — B is correct.
